title: usage_day — one day of Claude Code activity
description: A BOUND type: activity is read from ~/.claude, not stored here. `prompts` comes from history.jsonl (complete and current); `messages`/`tool_calls`/`sessions` come from stats-cache.json where it reaches, and are null for days past its lastComputedDate. Validated against the `days` list of the `usage` projection.

messages.description: Total messages (stats-cache; null past its cutoff).

tool_calls.description: Tool calls (stats-cache; null past its cutoff).

sessions.description: Sessions active that day (stats-cache; null past its cutoff).
